sentences.target: Je vois une empreinte dans le sable.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vwa yn ɑ̃pʁɛ̃t dɑ̃ lə sabl/

translations.fr: Je vois une empreinte dans le sable.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vwa yn ɑ̃pʁɛ̃t dɑ̃ lə sabl/
translations.en: I see a footprint in the sand.
translations.es: Veo una huella en la arena.
translations.de: Ich sehe einen Fußabdruck im Sand.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在沙滩上看见一个脚印。
translations.yue: 我喺沙灘上見到一個腳印。
translations.vi: Tôi thấy một dấu chân trên cát.
translations.nl: Ik zie een voetafdruk in het zand.
translations.hi: मुझे रेत में एक पैर का निशान दिखता है.
translations.nb: Jeg ser et fotavtrykk i sanden.
translations.id: Aku melihat jejak kaki di pasir.
translations.sv: Jag ser ett fotavtryck i sanden.
translations.ro: Văd o urmă de pas în nisip.
translations.da: Jeg ser et fodaftryk i sandet.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular); syntactic subject of the verb 'vois'.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); transitive, takes 'une empreinte' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines the noun 'empreinte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'vois'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'sable'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: C'est mon empreinte digitale sur la porte.
sentences.reading: /sɛ mɔ̃ ɑ̃pʁɛ̃t diʒital syʁ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: C'est mon empreinte digitale sur la porte.
translations.ipa: /sɛ mɔ̃ ɑ̃pʁɛ̃t diʒital syʁ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: That's my fingerprint on the door.
translations.es: Esa es mi huella dactilar en la puerta.
translations.de: Das ist mein Fingerabdruck an der Tür.
translations.it: Quella è la mia impronta digitale sulla porta.
translations.yue: 嗰個係我喺門上嘅指紋。
translations.ru: Это мой отпечаток пальца на двери.
translations.pt: Essa é a minha impressão digital na porta.
translations.he: זה טביעת האצבע שלי על הדלת.
translations.vi: Đó là dấu vân tay của tôi trên cửa.
translations.nl: Dat is mijn vingerafdruk op de deur.
translations.uk: Це мій відбиток пальця на дверях.
translations.hu: Az az én ujjlenyomatom az ajtón.
translations.hi: वह दरवाज़े पर मेरी उंगली का निशान है.
translations.pl: To mój odcisk palca na drzwiach.
translations.el: Αυτό είναι το αποτύπωμά μου στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: Det er fingeravtrykket mitt på døren.
translations.id: Itu adalah sidik jari saya di pintu.
translations.sv: Det där είναι mitt fingeravtryck på dörren.
translations.ro: Aceea este amprenta mea pe ușă.
translations.cs: To je můj otisk prstu na dveřích.
translations.da: Det er mit fingeraftryk på døren.
translations.ja: それはドアについた私の指紋です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic pronoun 'ce' contracted with the copula 'est'; introduces a copular clause equating the subject with 'mon empreinte digitale'.
Possessive determiner; used before a feminine noun beginning with a vowel sound; marks 1st person singular possession of 'empreinte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the predicate nominal complement of 'C'est'.
Adjective modifying 'empreinte'; specifies type (fingerprint).
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur' (location).

sentences.target: On laisse toujours une empreinte quelque part.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ lɛs tuʒuʁ yn ɑ̃pʁɛ̃t kɛlkə paʁ/

translations.fr: On laisse toujours une empreinte quelque part.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ lɛs tuʒuʁ yn ɑ̃pʁɛ̃t kɛlkə paʁ/
translations.en: We always leave a mark somewhere.
translations.es: Siempre dejamos una huella en algún lugar.
translations.de: Wir hinterlassen immer irgendwo eine Spur.
translations.it: Lasciamo sempre una traccia da qualche parte.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们总会在某个地方留下痕迹。
translations.yue: 我哋總會喺某個地方留下痕跡。
translations.pt: Sempre deixamos uma marca em algum lugar.
translations.tr: Her zaman bir yerde iz bırakırız.
translations.vi: Chúng ta luôn để lại một dấu vết ở đâu đó.
translations.ar: نترك دائمًا أثرًا في مكان ما.
translations.nl: We laten altijd ergens een spoor achter.
translations.hi: हम हमेशा कहीं न कहीं कोई निशान छोड़ते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi etterlater alltid et spor et sted.
translations.id: Kita selalu meninggalkan jejak di suatu tempat.
translations.sv: Vi lämnar alltid ett spår någonstans.
translations.da: Vi efterlader altid et spor et sted.
translations.ja: 私たちはいつもどこかに痕跡を残す。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun; syntactic subject of 'laisse' (3rd person singular).
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); transitive, takes 'une empreinte' as direct object.
Adverb of frequency modifying the verb 'laisse'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'empreinte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'laisse'.
Indefinite determiner modifying 'part'; together with 'part' forms the idiomatic expression 'quelque part'.
Common noun; with 'quelque' forms the fixed expression 'quelque part' functioning adverbially ('somewhere').

sentences.target: Notre empreinte carbone m’inquiète ces jours-ci.

translations.fr: Notre empreinte carbone m’inquiète ces jours-ci.
translations.en: Our carbon footprint worries me these days.
translations.es: Me preocupa nuestra huella de carbono estos días.
translations.de: Unser CO2-Fußabdruck macht mir in letzter Zeit Sorgen.
translations.it: La nostra impronta di carbonio mi preoccupa in questi giorni.
translations.zh-Hans: 最近我们的碳足迹让我担心。
translations.yue: 我最近為我哋嘅碳足印擔心。
translations.ru: Меня в последнее время беспокоит наш углеродный след.
translations.pt: Nossa pegada de carbono tem me preocupado ultimamente.
translations.he: טביעת הרגל הפחמנית שלנו מדאיגה אותי לאחרונה.
translations.tr: Son zamanlarda karbon ayak izimiz beni endişelendiriyor.
translations.vi: Dạo này dấu chân cacbon của chúng ta khiến tôi lo lắng.
translations.nl: Onze CO2-voetafdruk baart me de laatste tijd zorgen.
translations.uk: Останнім часом мене турбує наш вуглецевий слід.
translations.hu: Az utóbbi időben aggaszt a szén-dioxid-lábnyomunk.
translations.hi: इन दिनों हमारा कार्बन पदचिह्न मुझे चिंतित करता है.
translations.pl: Nasz ślad węglowy niepokoi mnie ostatnio.
translations.el: Το ανθρακικό μας αποτύπωμα με ανησυχεί τελευταία.
translations.nb: Vårt karbonavtrykk bekymrer meg om dagen.
translations.id: Jejak karbon kita membuat saya khawatir belakangan ini.
translations.ro: Amprenta noastră de carbon mă îngrijorează în ultima vreme.
translations.cs: Naše uhlíková stopa mě v poslední době znepokojuje.
translations.da: Vores CO2-aftryk bekymrer mig for tiden.
translations.fi: Meidän hiilijalanjälkemme huolettaa minua viime aikoina.
translations.ja: 最近、私たちのカーボンフットプリントが心配です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, singular; determines 'empreinte' and marks 1st person plural possession.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Noun used as a modifier, forming the compound 'empreinte carbone' (type specification).
Finite verb (3rd person singular present) with attached clitic object 'm’' ('me'); predicates the main clause meaning 'worries me'.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; determines 'jours-ci'.
Noun with postposed demonstrative particle '-ci' forming a fixed expression; the NP functions as a temporal adverbial ('these days').

On laisse toujours une empreinte quelque part.
Notre empreinte carbone m’inquiète ces jours-ci.
